name: Concert Editorial Carousel
aesthetic: Editorial invitation — cream paper background, thin black ink frame lines with tiny star accents, all-caps condensed sans typography in columns, brush-script accent for numbers/prices, full-bleed portrait photo with vertical sidebar labels. Quiet, refined, magazine-layout. Feels like an indie-theater zine or a fashion editorial.

fonts.display_condensed: Archivo Black / Barlow Condensed (UPPERCASE headers, kickers)
fonts.brush: Caveat Brush / Permanent Marker (price number / standout accents)

theme_vars.--accent: single accent color used sparingly (price brush, divider dots). Shift per artist/mood: red for passion, teal for cool/jazz, pink for pop, amber for acoustic.
theme_vars.--brush: color of the brush-script number (often same as --accent)

slides.subject: Thin top frame with stars, large condensed invite headline, 3-column info block (date / venue / details), brush-script price on left, full-bleed portrait photo filling bottom 55%, vertical 'LIVE SHOW' side-label on left edge of photo.
Same editorial frame, 'PRE-SHOW' kicker, 'EAT FIRST' headline, restaurant photo inside thin black frame, info columns (name / neighbourhood / distance), brush-script for distance.
Mirror of slide 2 — 'AFTER' kicker, 'LATE BITE' headline, second restaurant photo, open-until info, brush-script hour.
Editorial columns layout: 'IF YOU LIKE' → artist name (condensed big), 'YOU NEED' → cuisine/dish name, small food photo, one-line bridge copy, vertical side-label.
Minimal cream CTA, thin-line editorial frame, BiteMap transparent logo, brush-script tagline, app badges.
slides.copy: Fixed: 'read the guide on' / BiteMap logo / brush-tag / app badges

inputs_required.artistImageUrl: string — portrait or performance photo, high-res

copy_rules: Headlines use UPPERCASE condensed bold — short and direct, no hype words
Brush-script reserved for ONE thing per slide (price, distance, open-until hour) — the single visual accent
Info columns are 2-3 lines max, tight leading
No exclamation points, no emojis, no marketing clichés
Pairing logic on slide 4 must be defensible (Bon Iver → ramen; Tyler, the Creator → omakase; SZA → soul food)
asset_rules: Portrait photo must be editorial quality — clean lighting, strong subject
Restaurant photos close-ups of signature dish, black-frame treatment
Min 1080px wide; real photos only (no AI)
use_when: Indie / acoustic / jazz / R&B / theater concerts
Intimate venues (<5k seats) where audience skews design-conscious
Tour-stop coverage where the pairing narrative matters more than hype
